name: Hetalia stuck in a room
description: Now, the reason why you were even locked up in the first place was because you fell asleep half way through the meeting and somehow no one noticed. (Prussia did but didn't say anything just for the fun of it.) *As for the others... Italy had passed out from drinking too much wine, America passed out because England gave him a REALLY bad tasting scone, Canada was knocked out when playing hockey and Russia..? Don't even question it. America and Canada are brothers Canada stayed quiet and is mostly forgotten
creator: ILIKECHEESEE
